# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

// file: wp-content/plugins/my_user_auth/my-user-auth.php

if (!class_exists('MyUserAuth')) {
    class MyUserAuth {
        private $table_name;
        public function __construct() {
            global $wpdb;
            $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'my_users';
        }

        public function create_table() {
            global $wpdb;
            $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
            $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
                id mediumint(9) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                user_login varchar(255) NOT NULL,
                user_pass text NOT NULL,
                user_email varchar(255) DEFAULT '' NOT NULL,
                UNIQUE KEY user_login (user_login)
            ) {$charset_collate};";
            require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
            dbDelta($sql);
        }

        public function hash_password($password) {
            return password_hash($password, PASSWORD_BCRYPT);
        }

        public function compare_passwords($stored_password, $provided_password) {
            return password_verify($provided_password, $stored_password);
        }

        public function register_user($username, $email, $password) {
            global $wpdb;
            $password = $this->hash_password($password);
            $result = $wpdb->insert(
                $this->table_name,
                array('user_login' => $username, 'user_pass' => $password, 'user_email' => $email)
            );
            return (bool)$result;
        }

        public function login_user($username, $password) {
            global $wpdb;
            $stored_user = $wpdb->get_row("SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE user_login = '{$username}'");

            if ($stored_user && $this->compare_passwords($stored_user->user_pass, $password)) {
                wp_set_auth_cookie($stored_user->ID);
                return true;
            } else {
                return false;
            }
        }
    }
}
